valueStatement: Rev.io offers financial value through month-to-month pricing with no setup fees at $115/user/month (5-user minimum) plus $30 for mobile users, totaling an estimated $575–$605/month while replacing multiple tools. Operationally, it delivers unified real-time inventory across warehouses and trucks, mobile app functionality with photos and signatures for iPad workflows, project and ticket management in one system, QuickBooks Online integration, and AI automation for ticketing, workflows, and customer management with role-based technician access and time tracking. Strategically, it consolidates tools to lower complexity, scales with growth, includes future integrations with NinjaOne and Acronis, and offers a low-risk trial with no long-term commitment.

rawSolutions:
All-in-one PSA that: 
- Centralizes service delivery + ticketing + time tracking + inventory/assets + quoting + billing
- Uses AI to speed up analysis and reduce “dig through tickets/report flags” work
- Improves job costing and profitability reporting
- Automates recurring billing with approval workflows
- Gives techs and office staff a usable mobile + web experience with the right permissions
rawValue:
- AI-native assistant "Revii" to summarize ticket patterns by customer and timeframe (e.g., last 30 days) without manual research.
- Faster, easier reporting and job costing/profitability analysis.
- Clean asset management per site with serial numbers and historical equipment visibility.
- Inventory management across PO → receiving → assignment to customer/site.
- Unified quoting with electronic signature included; flexibility to keep email-approval flow if desired.
- Quote structure to show purchase vs rental options with separate totals.
- Dispatch board + calendar views for technician scheduling; auto-assignment by skills/groups.
- Mobile + web access for field users; permissioning to "wall off" roles while controlling cost.
- Recurring billing automation with checks-and-balances workflow (generate invoice, notify accounting, send after review) + customer portal for payments and ticket submission.
- Integrations: Stripe supported; open REST API for custom integrations (Zoho pre-sale), HubSpot integration available.
- US-based support and more "fleshed out" starting templates to reduce DIY build burden.
solutionPoints: Centralizes service delivery, ticketing, time tracking, inventory/assets, quoting, and billing
Uses AI to speed up analysis and reduce manual ticket research and report flag work
Improves job costing and profitability reporting
Automates recurring billing with approval workflows
Provides techs and office staff with usable mobile and web experience with appropriate permissions
valueStatement: Rev.io's AI-native assistant Revii summarizes ticket patterns by customer and timeframe without manual research, enabling faster reporting and job costing analysis. The platform offers clean asset management per site with serial numbers and historical visibility, inventory management from PO through assignment, unified quoting with e-signature and purchase/rental options, dispatch and calendar views with auto-assignment by skills, mobile and web access with role-based permissioning, and recurring billing automation with customer portal. Integrations include Stripe, a REST API for custom builds, HubSpot, and the platform features US-based support with pre-built templates to reduce setup burden.

valuePoints: Quoting & E-Signature: Seamless process triggers automation upon signature, auto-creates recurring contracts/service agreements, one-time purchases assigned to tickets with payment capability. TD Synex integration in development
Asset Management: Auto-creates assets when hardware invoiced, serialization support, scan serials from POs

rawSolutions:
Quoting / esignature
Tax Calculation

rawValue:
Quoting & E-Signature: Seamless process triggers automation upon signature, auto-creates recurring contracts/service agreements, one-time purchases assigned to tickets with payment capability. TD Synex integration in development.

Tax Automation: Built-in tax database checks by service location, eliminates manual Maryland processes (saves 6-10 hrs/month).

Asset Management: Auto-creates assets when hardware invoiced, serialization support, scan serials from POs.

Inventory & POs: Full management, generate POs from tickets, drop-shipping with serial scanning.

Unlimited Onboarding: "Graduate when you decide" vs Halo's 10 hours. Dedicated team, on-demand support.

Licensing: $30/month tech-only option. Potential read-only/financial license for accountants.
valueStatement: Quoting and E-Signature automates processes upon signature, auto-creating recurring contracts and service agreements with one-time purchases assigned to tickets and payment capability, with TD Synex integration in development. Tax Automation includes a built-in tax database that checks by service location and eliminates manual Maryland processes, saving 6-10 hours per month. Asset Management auto-creates assets when hardware is invoiced with serialization support and serial scanning from POs. Inventory and POs offer full management with PO generation from tickets and drop-shipping with serial scanning. Unlimited onboarding allows graduation on the customer's timeline versus Halo's 10-hour limit, with a dedicated team and on-demand support. Licensing includes a $30/month tech-only option with potential read-only and financial license options for accountants.

valuePoints: Single pane of glass: Eliminates multiple disconnected systems, consolidates phone billing, PSA, and future RMM into one platform
AI-native platform: Built-in AI assistant (Revy) can summarize customer history, create tickets, log time entries via voice commands, revise notes for professional communication
Professional billing: Modern invoice presentation with multiple payment options (ACH, credit card, checks) vs. outdated SkySwitch bills
Full PSA capabilities: Service desk, ticketing, time tracking, dispatch board, scheduling with calendar integration (Google/Microsoft 365)
rawSolutions: PSA (5 seats no field), RMM and Billing down the road
rawValue:
• Single pane of glass: Eliminates multiple disconnected systems, consolidates phone billing, PSA, and future RMM into one platform
• AI-native platform: Built-in AI assistant (Revy) can summarize customer history, create tickets, log time entries via voice commands, revise notes for professional communication
• Professional billing: Modern invoice presentation with multiple payment options (ACH, credit card, checks) vs. outdated SkySwitch bills
• Full PSA capabilities: Service desk, ticketing, time tracking, dispatch board, scheduling with calendar integration (Google/Microsoft 365)
• Quote-to-cash: Built-in CPQ with e-signature, eliminates separate quoting software
• Inventory management: Multi-location tracking with serial numbers, replaces QuickBooks inventory issues
• Mobile-optimized: Responsive design works on any device, native app coming Q1 2026
• Customer portal: Self-service for invoices, tickets, autopay setup
• Real-time QuickBooks sync: Eliminates manual reconciliation, customers/invoices/payments sync automatically
• Knowledge base: Built-in for internal and customer documentation
solutionPoints: RMM and Billing down the road
valueStatement: Single pane of glass eliminates multiple disconnected systems and consolidates phone billing, PSA, and future RMM into one platform. AI-native platform with built-in AI assistant (Revy) can summarize customer history, create tickets, log time entries via voice commands, and revise notes for professional communication. Modern invoice presentation with multiple payment options (ACH, credit card, checks) replaces outdated SkySwitch bills. Full PSA capabilities include service desk, ticketing, time tracking, dispatch board, and scheduling with calendar integration (Google/Microsoft 365). Built-in CPQ with e-signature eliminates separate quoting software. Multi-location inventory tracking with serial numbers replaces QuickBooks inventory issues. Responsive mobile-optimized design works on any device with native app coming Q1 2026. Customer portal provides self-service for invoices, tickets, and autopay setup. Real-time QuickBooks sync eliminates manual reconciliation with automatic syncing of customers, invoices, and payments. Built-in knowledge base supports internal and customer documentation.
